hooks.command: bash -c 'hits=$(grep -rnE "^use sicompass_(filebrowser|settings|chatclient|emailclient|webbrowser|tutorial|remote|sales_demo)::" "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR"/src/sicompass/src 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$hits" ]; then echo "SDK boundary violation: app code must not import lib crates directly. All communication goes through sicompass-sdk and sicompass-builtins. Offending imports:" >&2; echo "$hits" >&2; exit 2; fi'
